ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* The type of election (e.g., presidential, midterm, primary) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* The date of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., AK, AL) */,
  "state_idx" INTEGER /* Index of the state for sorting purposes */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* The total population of the state */,
  "voting_eligible_population" INTEGER /* The population of the state that is eligible to vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the result belongs to */,
  "dem_votes" REAL /* Number of votes for the Democratic candidate */,
  "rep_votes" REAL /* Number of votes for the Republican candidate */,
  "other_votes" REAL /* Number of votes for other candidates */,
  "incumbent" REAL /* Incumbent party's vote share */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of the population that voted in the election */,
  "winner_party" TEXT /* The party of the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* The birth date of the candidate */,
  "running_mate" TEXT /* The running mate of the candidate (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_candidates" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate in the election */,
  "candidate_order" INTEGER /* The order of the candidate on the ballot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "voting_age_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state that is of voting age */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the state */,
  "demographic_year" INTEGER /* The year the demographic data was collected */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* The age distribution of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting trend entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the trend belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the trend belongs to */,
  "vote_share_dem" REAL /* Democratic vote share in the state */,
  "vote_share_rep" REAL /* Republican vote share in the state */,
  "vote_share_other" REAL /* Other vote share in the state */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* The type of trend (e.g., voting pattern, demographic shift) */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* The year the trend was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_trends_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* The method used to access the data (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* The status of the access attempt (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The type of data provided by the source (e.g., election results, demographic data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_category" TEXT /* The category of the note (e.g., election results, candidate information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_notes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "paper_title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "paper_url" TEXT /* URL of the research paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the paper was published */,
  "paper_category" TEXT /* The category of the research paper (e.g., election analysis, demographic study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the author contributed to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* The affiliation of the author (e.g., university, research institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)
